methods.name: Stripe
methods.note: One-time or recurring — Stripe handles cards, Apple Pay, and bank transfers globally.

methods.name: PayPal
methods.note: Quick donation path if PayPal is already your default payment flow.

methods.name: GitHub Sponsors
methods.note: Recurring support directly inside GitHub, where most of our work lives.

methods.name: Buy Me a Coffee
methods.note: One-time or recurring support with a platform built for creators.

recurring_tiers.name: Infiltrator
recurring_tiers.tagline: Stay close to the experiments, no noise. The undercover reader who shows up every week.

recurring_tiers.name: Dissident
recurring_tiers.tagline: Read early, influence what gets written next. You question defaults by nature.

recurring_tiers.name: Renegade
recurring_tiers.tagline: Aligned with the vision. You believe engineering clarity beats engineering fear.

recurring_tiers.name: Field Commander
recurring_tiers.tagline: Priority Q&A, direct feedback loop. You lead from the trenches, not the slides.

recurring_tiers.name: Manifesto
recurring_tiers.tagline: Patron of the rebellion. Fund work that organizations are too scared to commission.

one_time_tiers.name: Ammo Drop
one_time_tiers.tagline: Quick fuel for the next lab experiment. Covers one late night of research.

one_time_tiers.name: Field Ration
one_time_tiers.tagline: Keep the labs running between deployments. The post that saved you an afternoon was worth this.

one_time_tiers.name: Break Glass
one_time_tiers.tagline: The one you reach for when something we wrote saved a production incident.

one_time_tiers.name: Force Push
one_time_tiers.tagline: The rebel move. All-in support for independent, no-compromise engineering writing.

one_time_tiers.name: The Override
one_time_tiers.tagline: Sponsor a specific essay, guide, or experiment. Your name in the acknowledgements.

debt_quadrants.title: Known Knowns
debt_quadrants.move: We expose shortcuts early, document tradeoffs, and turn pressure into conscious decisions.

debt_quadrants.title: Unknown Knowns
debt_quadrants.move: We track shifts in AI, platform tooling, and architecture so teams can prepare before the bill arrives.

debt_quadrants.title: Known Unknowns
debt_quadrants.move: We publish playbooks that reduce avoidable mistakes before they become production gravity.

debt_quadrants.title: Unknown Unknowns
debt_quadrants.move: We test bold ideas safely so innovation does not silently become tomorrow's incident queue.
